-   More
    
    [Documentation](https://ttlc.intuit.com/turbotax-support/en-us/help-article/tax-return/access-turbotax-tools-claude)[Privacy Policy](https://www.intuit.com/privacy/statement/)[Support](https://ttlc.intuit.com/turbotax-support/en-us)
    

Get fast federal tax estimates and discover filing options with Intuit TurboTax-powered tools. Start with a simple tax estimator that guides you through the info you need and see your refund or amount owed as you go. When you're ready for expert help, connect with trusted tax pros. Confident tax filing starts here.

You can use Intuit TurboTax to:

**Estimate your tax refund:**  
"I'm single, have 300k in wages and 5k withheld. Help me estimate my taxes"

**Search for Tax Experts:**  
"Help me find a tax expert for filing my taxes"

**Connect with Tax Experts:**  
"Help me connect with a tax expert"

**Explore Tax filing options:**  
"Show me tax filing options"
